    x11-themes/layan-gtk-themes: add new port

    Layan is a flat Material Design theme for GTK 3, GTK 2 and Gnome-Shell.

    Supported Desktop Environments:

    * Gnome-Shell
    * Plank
    * Xfce

    https://github.com/vinceliuice/Layan-gtk-theme
